debug_info.goal:
A : Type u
U V : A → Type v
hAUBV : ((a : A) → U a) = ((a : A) → V a)
⊢ U = V

failed_attempts:
funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun F => ∀ x, (a = x) → F x) hAUBV
  simp only [forall_eq'] at h
  exact h
funext fun a => by rw [← hAUBV]
exact funext fun a => congrArg (· a) (show (fun a => U a) = (fun a => V a) from congrArg (fun _ a => sorry) hAUBV)

funext a
  have h := congrArg (fun F => F a) (congrArg (fun T => (b : A) → (a = b) → T b) hAUBV)
  simp only [forall_eq'] at h
  exact h

apply funext; intro a
  have h := @congrArg _ _ (fun (F : A → Type v) => F a) U V
  apply h
  exact funext fun a => eqRec_heq' hAUBV (fun x => x a) ▸ rfl |> eq_of_heq
exact @Function.Injective.eq_iff _ _ (fun F => (a : A) → F a) (fun _ _ h => funext fun a => congrArg (· a) h) _ _ |>.mp hAUBV
exact funext fun a => congrArg (· a) (show (fun a => U a) = (fun a => V a) from congrArg (fun F a => F a) hAUBV)

apply funext
  intro a
  have := congrArg (fun F => F → F) hAUBV
  sorry

funext a
  have h := @congrArg _ _ ((a : A) → U a) ((a : A) → V a) (fun T => ∀ _ : T, Unit) hAUBV
  injection hAUBV
funext fun a => congrArg (· a) (Eq.symm (congrArg _ hAUBV))
exact funext fun a => congrArg (fun F => F a) (congrArg (fun _ => U) rfl)
exact congrArg (·) <| funext fun a => Function.eq_of_piType_eq hAUBV a

funext a
  exact congrArg (· a) hAUBV
exact congrArg (fun F a => F a) hAUBV

have h : ∀ a, U a = V a := fun a => by
    have := congrArg (fun T => (x : A) → x = a → T) hAUBV
    simp only [forall_eq] at this
    exact this
  exact funext h
